chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.D- 542 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A- 5823 of 2020 (Urgency application). 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2020 None present for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. = Listed application (M.A-5823 of 2020) was filed on behalf of A.A.G Sindh on the ground that right from 13.04.2017, the petitioner as well as his counsel had not been appearing and have chosen to remain absent instead of pursuing the instant petition vigilantly. Learned A.A.G states that instant petition has been hanging upon the board of this Court since 24.02.2017 without any progress, therefore, it will be appropriate to get it disposed of hence urgency has been filed. In view of above, urgency disposed of. Upon perusal of record instant petition seems to have been filed for protection against the alleged illegal harassment being caused by the official respondents as well as release of his vehicle / bus bearing registration No.JA- 9122. The prayer so made would requires evidence which cannot be done by this Court while exercising its writ jurisdiction under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973; and, therefore, the petition in hand, in view of above, is not maintainable. Consequently, the same is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE S
